choose a throne:

Event: Roving Restaurant
Event Date: 08/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: B51
Wolfhound Bow

When attacking, has a 25% chance of dealing 120% damage to a group of enemies.
Once in a while, the unit fires frost arrows at 3 random enemy units. When an arrow hits, it deals pure damage equal to 200% of the caster unit's the target attack and afflicts the target with the deep freezing effect for 4 sec. For that duration, the frozen unit is unable to move or attack, and the cooldown of all its abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 4 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the target of the ability explodes and receives 400000 magic damage. Icicles fly out of them, hitting 2 nearest enemy units. On hit, icicles deal 450000 magic damage, increase the cooldown of the targets' gear and artifact abilities by 4 sec., and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 40% for 4 sec. If the enemy units were already frozen when hit with the frost arrow, frost projectiles are additionally launched from them at 2 nearest enemy units. When the projectiles hit, they deal pure damage to the targets, equal to 30% of the targets' maximum health, and have a 50% to freeze them for 3 sec. The frozen units cannot move or attack for the duration, and the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
